name: TRAVELZOO
business: Travelzoo is a global Internet media company that operates Travelzoo, Jack's Flight Club, and Travelzoo META, reaching 30 million travelers. It generates revenue from advertising and commerce, membership fees, and other sources, primarily by publishing travel and local offers from over 5,000 providers. The company serves travel enthusiasts through email, websites, social media, and mobile apps, and offers advertising and marketing services to travel and local businesses.
sellsTo: licensees in Australia, New Zealand, Singapore, Japan, South Korea

exposures.sentence: Advertising revenue consists primarily of (a) advertising fees paid by travel companies for the publishing of their offers on Travelzoo’s media properties, (b) commissions and revenues generated from the sale of Getaways vouchers and bookings on our hotel platform, and (c) publishing fees from high-quality local businesses, sale of Local Deals vouchers and entertainment offers.
In 2023 we launched Travelzoo META to extend the range of travel, entertainment and local experiences we offer to consumers to the Metaverse.

catalysts.event: Annual membership fee increased to $50 for new members in the United States
catalysts.sentence: On January 1, 2026, we increased the annual membership fee to $50 for new members in the United States only.

catalysts.event: New pricing for existing Club Members applies from next renewal after February 1, 2026
catalysts.sentence: For existing Club Members, the new pricing will apply from the next renewal of their membership after February 1, 2026.

catalysts.event: Include Metaverse travel experiences as a benefit of Travelzoo club membership
catalysts.sentence: We plan to include Metaverse travel experiences as a benefit of Travelzoo club membership in 2026, allowing us to utilize and leverage all we have learned and developed over the past few years for Travelzoo META for the benefit of our Club Members.

tamClaims.claim: Global Travel & Tourism industry total economic contribution reached $11.7 trillion in 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: The global sector's total economic contribution grew about 7% year-over-year in 2025, reaching $11.7 trillion (approximately 10% of global GDP).

tamClaims.claim: U.S. Metaverse market estimated at approximately $32 billion in 2025, forecast to reach $395 billion by 2034.
tamClaims.sentence: According to Precedence Research, the U.S. Metaverse market in 2025 is estimated at approximately $32 billion of revenue. The market is anticipated to grow rapidly and is forecasted to reach $395 billion by 2034.

tamClaims.claim: Social media ad spend reached approximately $247 billion in 2024.
tamClaims.sentence: Social media ad spend continues to grow strongly, reaching approximately $247 billion in 2024, according to WARC Media.
